terms.title: Contract Terms
terms.introduction: This Contract is entered into by the Client with IDEAL TV, a French-law entity, a simplified joint-stock registered with the Basse-Terre Trade and Companies Register (Guadeloupe) under number 840 102 164.

signature.title: Digital Signature
signature.description: Sign below to complete your subscription contract
signature.agreement: By this signature, I certify that I have the necessary capacity to enter into and execute the Contract. I acknowledge the contract terms and confirm that I have read the contract and accept its terms.
